product_overview: Crossflow is a gym management dashboard that lets admins manage athletes, coaches, class templates and schedules, handle support tickets, and surface notifications and settings in a single web app.
core_goals: Allow staff to sign in and access a central dashboard overview of gym activity
Manage athlete records (add, edit, delete) and view athlete lists
Manage coach records (add, edit, delete) and view coach lists
Create and maintain reusable class templates and schedule classes via a calendar
Track and manage support tickets raised by athletes or staff
Surface in-app notifications and allow users to mark them read
Provide a settings area where users can view and modify application preferences

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate into the app using an email and password to access the dashboard and protected areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with invalid credentials -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Provide a home overview with key statistics, recent activity and quick actions to navigate to management areas.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View dashboard stats -> Navigate via sidebar to /athletes -> Access quick actions
Navigate to / -> View dashboard stats -> Navigate via sidebar to /classes -> Access quick actions

features.name: Athletes Management
features.description: List and manage athlete records (UI-only CRUD). Note: create/update/delete currently modify local UI state and are not persisted to the backend.
user_flows: Navigate to /athletes -> View athletes list -> Add new athlete -> Fill athlete details -> Submit new athlete -> See new athlete in list
Navigate to /athletes -> View athletes list -> Select athlete to edit -> Edit athlete details -> Save changes -> See updated athlete details in list
Navigate to /athletes -> View athletes list -> Select athlete to delete -> Confirm deletion -> See athlete removed from list

features.name: Coaches Management
features.description: List and manage coach records (UI-only CRUD). Note: create/update/delete currently modify local UI state and are not persisted to the backend.
user_flows: Navigate to /coaches -> View coaches list -> Add new coach -> Fill coach details -> Submit new coach -> See new coach in list
Navigate to /coaches -> View coaches list -> Select coach to edit -> Edit coach details -> Save changes -> See updated coach details in list
Navigate to /coaches -> View coaches list -> Select coach to delete -> Confirm deletion -> See coach removed from list

features.name: Classes Management
features.description: Create and manage class templates used to schedule class instances and display duration and description info.
user_flows: Navigate to /classes -> View class templates list -> Create new class template -> Fill class template details -> Submit class template -> See new class template in list
Navigate to /classes -> View class templates list -> Select class template to edit -> Edit class details -> Save changes -> See updated class template in list
Navigate to /classes -> View class templates list -> Select class template to delete -> Confirm deletion -> See class template removed from list

features.name: Calendar View
features.description: Show scheduled classes across dates and allow navigation between dates to inspect class instances.
user_flows: Navigate to /calendar -> View calendar with scheduled classes -> Navigate between dates -> Inspect classes on selected date
Navigate to /calendar -> View calendar with scheduled classes -> Navigate to a week view -> Inspect classes across the week

features.name: Tickets System
features.description: Allow users to create and track support tickets and view ticket status in a list.
user_flows: Navigate to /tickets -> View tickets list -> Create new ticket -> Fill ticket subject and description -> Submit ticket -> See ticket in list with status
Navigate to /tickets -> View tickets list -> Select a ticket -> View ticket status

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Display in-app notifications and let users manage read state.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications -> View notifications list -> Mark notification as read -> See notification marked as read
Navigate to /notifications -> View notifications list -> Open notification to read details -> Return to notifications list

features.name: Settings
features.description: Expose application and user preferences that can be viewed and modified.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> View settings options -> Modify settings -> Save changes -> See updated settings reflected

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard with statistics and overview

known_limitations.issue: Admin CRUD is UI-only, not connected to backend API
known_limitations.impact: Create/update/delete only modify local state, not persisted to Supabase
